title: DSP inference for Xilinx (improved for ice40, initial support for ecp5)
body:
`synth_xilinx` now automatically infers `DSP48E1` cells, support multiply with (any?) combination of `([ABCDMP]|AD)REG=[12]` (with and without reset and enable), pre-adder, post-adder/accumulation, with C->P connections converted to PCOUT->PCIN cascading where possible, with limited [AB]COUT -> [AB]CIN cascading too. `-nodsp` to disable.

Also containing two (even more) experimental DSP48E1 features:
- Use SIMD mode based on presence of a `(* use_dsp="simd" *)` attribute
- Automatic inference of pattern detector to detect overflow (terms and conditions apply), based on presence of a greater-than-or-equal `>=` operation on the (registered) P output

See `help xilinx_dsp` for more details.

`synth_ecp5` also infers `MULT18X18D`. `-nodsp` to disable.

In all cases, wide multipliers are now decomposed into several multiplier and shift-add cells.
In the xilinx and ice40 cases, these shift-adds are packed into the primitive where possible.
